emails.subject: Te Ex Energy
emails.body: Te Ex Energy Russell, Stephanie called yesterday and said this counterparty called EOL and wanted to get opened to trade financial online and get an ISDA in place. I spoke to Tom Moran about this counterparty this morning to see if we saw them as a swap counterparty before I called them, and Tom told me that he did not think Credit wanted to trade financial with this counterparty. He asked me to pass the counterparty's name number on to you so you could give them a call to break the news to them. The woman who called is named karen and her no. is 713/974-9394.

emails.subject: RE: Te Ex Energy
emails.body: RE: Te Ex Energy Gee, I don't know who to thank for this honor.

emails.subject: RE: Te Ex Energy
emails.body: RE: Te Ex Energy Gee, I don't know who to thank for this honor.

emails.subject: RE: Te Ex Energy
emails.body: It's only a reflection of our high regard for you that we pass on this matter for your adept handling. Russell Diamond/ENRON@enronXgate 03/22/2001 05:22 PM

emails.subject: RE: Te Ex Energy
